_publications._publicationTitle: Immune profiling of NF1-associated tumors reveals histologic subtype distinctions and heterogeneity: implications for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: The average PD-L1 staining scores did not vary significantly amongst the individual tumor subtypes. All tumor histologies consistently showed broad ranges of PD-L1 scores within their respective group.
details: Successfully detected PD-L1 expression in tumor samples by immunohistochemistry with broad ranges of staining scores (0-300 range) within each tumor histology group, showing no significant difference between average expression levels of different tumor subtypes
